title: Failure Frame: I Became the Strongest and Annihilated Everything with Low-Level Spells
sourceNotes: Single 12-episode season (Seven Arcs, 2024) adapts light novel volumes 1-4; the anilistMangaId here points at the separate manga adaptation (AniList's light-novel entry doesn't track a chapter count), which covers the same content through approx. chapter 44 (community continuation point cited as vol. 9, ch. 44.2). Manga ongoing (current ch. 70 as of mid-2026). No widely established named arcs for this fast-paced revenge-isekai story, so mapping uses broad coverage entries.
